calendar.matters:
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Distribution Of Shawnee Thomas' Estate
Off Calendar Nov-15-2022 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Distribution Of Shawnee Thomas' Estate
Off Calendar Aug-09-2022 Continued To Nov-15-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Jun-13-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Greer Smith, via Zoom, for and with Ronald Thomas.

Mr. Thomas confirms that Katherine's mother passed away five years before Eddie Thomas. Ms. Smith confirms that Shawnee's estate will be filed in Sacramento and that she will be representing the petitioner in that matter.

After additional discussion, the matter is taken under submission. A Status on Distribution of Shawnee Thomas' Estate is set for Aug-09-2022 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Joseph Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Singh. Not Reported.
